+ CONFIG_ADPCM_SANYO_DECODER 0
+ CONFIG_APV_PARSER 0
+ CONFIG_AVISYNTH_DEMUXER 0
+ CONFIG_BLACKDETECT_VULKAN_FILTER 0
+ CONFIG_CELP_MATH 0
+ CONFIG_DTLS_PROTOCOL 0
+ CONFIG_DVDVIDEO_DEMUXER 0

+ CONFIG_LIBOAPV_ENCODER 0
+ CONFIG_MPEGVIDEOENCDSP 0
+ CONFIG_PAD_CUDA_FILTER 0
+ CONFIG_RESOURCE_COMPRESSION 0
+ CONFIG_SCDET_VULKAN_FILTER 0
+ CONFIG_VP9_AMF_DECODER 0
+ CONFIG_VVC_SEI 0
+ CONFIG_WHIP_MUXER 0
+ HAVE_GLOB 1
+ HAVE_IOCTL_POSIX 0
+ HAVE_IOCTL_POSIX 1
- CONFIG_AVISYNTH_DEMUXER 0
- CONFIG_DVDVIDEO_DEMUXER 0
- CONFIG_IIRFILTER 0
- CONFIG_POSTPROC 0
